tests.scenario: DeepSeek plan generation times out after 30s
tests.expectedBehavior: PIPELINE_FAILED emitted, pipeline marked FAILED, no newsletter generated

tests.scenario: DeepSeek returns non-JSON or malformed JSON after retry
tests.expectedBehavior: PIPELINE_FAILED emitted, no newsletter generated, pipeline marked FAILED
tests.actualBehavior: Pipeline status=FAILED, reason=DeepSeek failed to return valid JSON after retry

tests.scenario: Network error (ECONNREFUSED, ENOTFOUND, etc.) connecting to DeepSeek API
tests.expectedBehavior: PIPELINE_FAILED emitted, pipeline marked FAILED, disk state also FAILED
Delivery marked FAILED, retry behavior consistent, no SUCCESS state

tests.scenario: Apps Script returns HTTP 200 with HTML error page body
tests.expectedBehavior: Response validation detects HTML error, delivery marked FAILED, retry skipped (deployment issue)
tests.actualBehavior: Classification accuracy: true ([]), Pipeline handling: pipelineCorrect=true

tests.scenario: Apps Script deployed without doPost handler
tests.expectedBehavior: MISSING_DOPOST classified, delivery marked FAILED, no retry (deployment issue)

tests.scenario: git commit fails (dirty tree, merge conflict, hook rejection)
tests.expectedBehavior: Pipeline stops at GIT stage, PIPELINE_FAILED emitted, no WEBHOOK execution
Pipeline stops at GIT stage, PIPELINE_FAILED emitted, no WEBHOOK execution

tests.scenario: editor-agent never completes, no AGENT_BATCH_COMPLETE emitted
tests.expectedBehavior: verifyAgentCompletion returns false, pipeline detects stall, fails safely
tests.actualBehavior: Agents: macro=complete, gcc=complete, risk=complete, editor=pending, verifyAgentCompletion=false

tests.scenario: macro completes, gcc and risk agents stall indefinitely
tests.expectedBehavior: Barrier times out after 5min, returns false, pipeline detects stall and fails safely — no infinite loop
System detects invalid state, logs warning, does not continue blindly. Starts fresh with clean state.

tests.scenario: agent-state.json contains valid JSON but missing fields (partial run state)
tests.expectedBehavior: loadAgentState fills defaults for missing agents. System can reinitialize cleanly.

tests.scenario: runtime/state.json has orphaned activeRunId + stale recovery flag
tests.expectedBehavior: acquireLock rejects new runs while orphaned lock exists. releaseLock clears state. System recovers via explicit unlock.
